Year: The year the data was collected.
Total_Abandonment_Rate: The percentage of patients who abandoned their booking attempts on the MediConn platform within the year.
Abandonment_At_Payment_Stage: The percentage of total booking abandonments that occurred during the payment information entry phase.
Abandonment_At_Selection_Stage: The percentage of total booking abandonments that occurred during the availability selection step.
Not_Rebooked_Rate: The percentage of patients who abandoned their booking and did not attempt to rebook through alternative channels.
